---
title: "Instructor Only: Grouped Summaries Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
nhanes <- read_csv("data/real/nhanes_2021_2023_analysis.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

bp_by_age <- nhanes |>
  filter(age_years >= 18, !is.na(age_group), !is.na(systolic_mean)) |>
  group_by(age_group) |>
  summarize(
    n = n(),
    mean_systolic = mean(systolic_mean),
    sd_systolic = sd(systolic_mean),
    se_systolic = sd_systolic / sqrt(n),
    lower = mean_systolic - 1.96 * se_systolic,
    upper = mean_systolic + 1.96 * se_systolic,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(age_group = reorder(age_group, mean_systolic))

ggplot(bp_by_age, aes(x = age_group, y = mean_systolic)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.15, color = "gray50") +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Systolic Blood Pressure By Age Group",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean systolic blood pressure"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
